scope: zero-training paired sensitivity audit of the qualified p(F|A,L,N) checkpoint under controlled element and lattice side-state interventions

prerequisites.source_semantics: p(F|A,L,N), where A is one clean element token per coordinate row

decision_rule.authorize_j1: clean baseline reproduces the qualified source and both focal controlled interventions increase paired coordinate score error by at least 2% with positive structure-bootstrap lower bounds
decision_rule.do_not_authorize_j1: first repair or audit any side modality that is not measurably used; do not infer that simultaneous joint diffusion is invalid
decision_rule.boundary: Diagnostic-only OOD/local sensitivity. It cannot change historical H1a, train a topology branch, select a hard chain, or authorize tensor/oracle/relaxation/DFT/DFPT work.
